variant_name: 高令宁 — 江南和离后的独立母亲
trigger: 与沈词和离后南下江南，独自抚养昭昭、收信回信、在雪院中开始新生活时出现；这是她真正从旧怨中抽身后的稳定状态。

appearance_delta.face: 较前期更成熟沉静，眉眼依旧清凌，却少了针锋相对的戾气，多了看透后的冷淡从容
appearance_delta.body: 体态恢复修长挺拔，行动轻稳，带有独立生活后的松弛与掌控感
appearance_delta.hair: 已婚式样减弱，常为简洁端庄的盘发或便于日常起居的整齐发髻，装饰更少
appearance_delta.distinguishing_features: 锋利感收束为沉静气场，像真正掌握自己命运的母亲与女主人

costume_override.outfit: 江南日常家居长裙与披风，兼具清雅与实用，适合抚育女儿、读信写字与冬日庭院活动

visual_reference: Independent ancient Chinese woman living in Jiangnan, Song dynasty inspired hanfu, pale cool skin, oval face, calm sharp dark eyes, black hair in a simple elegant bun, refined casual dress in soft moon white, smoky teal and light gray, minimal jewelry, mature poised posture, reading letters in a Jiangnan study or standing in a snowy courtyard with her young daughter, serene yet emotionally guarded, cinematic natural light, quiet post-divorce freedom
